chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-624 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 01-04-2019 Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Instant criminal miscellaneous application has been filed on behalf of applicant Mst. Pathani seeking cancellation of bail under section 497 Cr.P.C granted to respondents No.1 to 9 by the learned Additional Sessions Judge Ubauro in Cr.B.A.No.749/2018, arising out of Crime No.77/2018, registered at Police Station Daharki, under sections 452, 324, 311, 506/2, 337-F(i), 147, 148 and 149 P.P.C, on the ground that the said respondents after obtaining pre-arrest bail have misused the concession of bail. When the learned counsel for the applicant was put on notice to satisfy on the point of maintainability of this application before this court as the order of learned Additional Sessions Judge was not impugned on merit, he admitting the fact that the proper remedy for seeking relief of cancellation of bail is available to applicant/complainant before the Court which granted pre-arrest bail to respondents, does not press this criminal miscellaneous application. Accordingly, the same stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
